gallery.mainAlt: The Starter — 1× 250 ml sea buckthorn elixir

info.title: The Starter
info.lead: Would you like to try the power of nordic gold first? «The Starter» is your entry into the AmberNord world. Every bottle is obtained from hand-picked berries of our exclusive Zelt Selection — with 9× more natural Vitamin C than citrus fruit. Vitamin C contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.
info.advantageBody: The Starter is your low-risk entry into the ritual. The first sip: bright, sour, alive — sea buckthorn in its pure form. This is how the ritual becomes a permanent part of your daily life.
info.scienceItem1: Cell protection: Vitamin C contributes to the protection of cells from oxidative stress.
info.scienceItem2: Omega-7: one of the rarest plant sources of palmitoleic acid — up to 42 % in the pulp oil.
info.scienceItem3: Yields over 2.5 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.scienceItem4: Absolute purity: no added sugar, no artificial flavours. 100% nature.
info.shippingText: Reliable premium shipping within Switzerland (excl. shipping costs). Direct shipping from our logistics centre in Aarau.
